subcodes.first_line: The Face of the Wronged One hath turned from this praiseworthy Station toward him who was named Muhammad-before-Taqi, that he may be drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه وجه المظلوم من هذا المقام المحمود الی من سمی بمحمد قبل تقی لیجذبه
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
